pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Each pack is designed to optimize your learning experience.

items.quote: The one-on-one sessions really helped me improve my pronunciation. Teachers listen and adapt the pace. Highly recommend!
items.name: Marie L.

items.quote: Flexible scheduling and patient professors. Perfect for busy professionals. I progressed in just 3 months.
items.name: Thomas D.

items.quote: I went from zero to conversational in just a few months. Amazing experience. The method is really effective.
items.name: Sophie M.

items.quote: Speaking groups gave me confidence. We practice in a supportive atmosphere. A real plus for oral skills!
items.name: Lucas B.

items.quote: Passed B2 on the first try thanks to personalized support. Teachers know the exams inside out.
items.name: Emma R.

items.quote: Finally a platform that combines quality and flexibility. Online lessons are as effective as in-person.
items.name: Nicolas F.

extraItems.quote: Best French learning experience I've had. The professors are knowledgeable and make every lesson engaging.
extraItems.name: Claire T.

extraItems.quote: My daughter improved dramatically in just two months. She now loves speaking French!
extraItems.name: David K.

extraItems.quote: Professional, flexible, and effective. Exactly what I needed for my DELF preparation.
extraItems.name: Amélie S.

extraItems.quote: The group sessions are fantastic. I've met people from around the world while improving my French.
extraItems.name: James P.

extraItems.quote: Clear explanations and patient teachers. I finally understand French grammar!
extraItems.name: Sarah W.

extraItems.quote: Worth every euro. The quality of instruction rivals in-person schools.
extraItems.name: Marc B.

extraItems.quote: The professors adapt to your level and goals. I felt supported from day one.
extraItems.name: Isabelle G.

extraItems.quote: Online lessons that actually work. My confidence in French has skyrocketed.
extraItems.name: Pierre M.

extraItems.quote: Small groups mean real speaking time. No more passive learning!
extraItems.name: Anna K.

extraItems.quote: Prepared for my C1 exam with tailored lessons. Passed with flying colors.
extraItems.name: Olivier D.

extraItems.quote: Best investment in my career. French opened doors I never expected.
extraItems.name: Laura V.

chatbot.title: French With Us Assistant
chatbot.subtitle: Ask questions about our courses
chatbot.welcome: Hello! I'm the French With Us assistant. Ask me about our French lessons, pricing, sign-up, or our teaching method. How can I help you?
chatbot.error: Sorry, I couldn't respond. Email us at frenchwithus.noreply@gmail.com for a personalized reply.

reservationChoice.title: Who is this reservation for?
reservationChoice.subtitle: Choose an option to access the free discovery session booking form.
reservationChoice.adultsDesc: French lessons for you. A discovery session tailored to your level and goals.
reservationChoice.childrenDesc: A discovery session for your child. We adapt the lesson to their age and confidence.

reservation.title: Offer your child a first encounter with French
reservation.titleAdults: A first encounter with French for you
reservation.intro: Share a few details and we will choose the ideal teacher for a free discovery session.
reservation.introAdults: Share a few details and we will choose the ideal teacher for your free discovery session.
reservation.benefitsTitleAdults: You will appreciate this session because:
reservation.benefit1: The session is adapted to your child's age and confidence level.
reservation.benefit1Adults: The session is adapted to your level and goals.
reservation.benefit2: We agree on a schedule that fits your family rhythm.
reservation.benefit2Adults: We agree on a schedule that fits your timetable.
reservation.benefit3: No commitment: come meet the teacher and try together.
reservation.benefit3Adults: No commitment: meet the teacher and try together.
reservation.benefit4: Personalized feedback after the session to plan next steps.
reservation.benefit4Adults: Personalized feedback after the session to plan next steps.
reservation.disclaimer: We progress at your child's pace and stay transparent. Our team will contact you personally after your request.
reservation.disclaimerAdults: We stay transparent and responsive. Our team will contact you personally after your request.
reservation.formIntro: Fill out the form: our pedagogical advisor will call you back within 24 hours.
reservation.emailHint: We will send your booking confirmation to this address. Please use a valid email you check regularly.
reservation.successMessage: Thank you! Your request has been saved. Our team will get back to you within 24 hours.
reservation.sendError: Error sending. Please try again or contact us by email.

admin.title: Dashboard
admin.meetingIssuesDesc: Courses ended due to technical issues. Relaunch them from the Courses page.
admin.professorAbsentDesc: The professor did not start the course within 15 minutes. Check the Courses page.

adminCourses.title: Weekly Courses
adminCourses.createDesc: Create weekly courses and assign a professor to each course.
adminCourses.meetingLinkHelp: This link is the video room. Professor and student click the same link to join the call.
adminCourses.autoGenerateDesc: Compare professor and student availability (Morocco time), find matching slots, and create courses without double booking.
adminCourses.dateTimeMoroccoHint: Date and time in Morocco time (Africa/Casablanca). Students and professors will see it in their local timezone.

adminStats.title: Student Statistics
adminStats.subtitle: Overview of courses and learning time for each student.

adminPayments.title: Payments
adminPayments.dueSoonDesc: Students with payments due in the next 7 days

blockedIps.title: Blocked IPs
blockedIps.subtitle: IPs blocked for exceeding 100 requests per minute. Unblock to allow access again.

adminAvailability.title: Availability
adminAvailability.subtitle: Manage student availability and view professor availability.
adminAvailability.slotInputHint: Input is in the student's local time.
adminAvailability.weeklyCalendarHint: Morocco time (24h). P = professors available, E = students available. Compatible when both P and E > 0.
adminAvailability.professorSlotsMoroccoHint: Teacher local time then Morocco reference (e.g. 9am Paris → 8am Morocco).
adminAvailability.clickToCreateCourseHint: Click a slot (P and E) to create a course.

adminMessages.title: Messages

adminReservations.title: Reservations

professor.title: Schedule
professor.availabilityDesc: Indicate your available slots. The admin will create courses and assign them to you.
professor.availabilityGridHint: Click and drag on a day to add a slot. To remove a slot, click the trash icon on it.
professor.countdownTooltip: Time remaining until course ends (15 min)
professor.startDisabledTooltip: The course can be started at the scheduled time
professor.noClassesDay: No classes or slots this day

livePage.title: Live lesson

livePage.accessDenied: Access reserved for students and professors.
livePage.professorArrived: The professor is online! You can join the lesson.
livePage.professorHint: Click to open the meeting. The student can use the same link.
livePage.endCourseDesc: Why are you ending this course?

student.paymentReferenceHint: Include this reference when paying via WhatsApp

student.profNotInMeet: The professor hasn't joined the class yet
student.availabilityDesc: Set your weekly availability (local time). Admin will create courses accordingly.
student.availabilityGridHint: Click and drag on a day to add a slot. To remove a slot, click the trash icon on it.
student.availabilityNeedTimezone: Your country or timezone must be set (by admin) to manage your slots in local time.
